overview.description: Oracle Corporation offers products and services that address enterprise information technology environments worldwide. Its Oracle cloud software as a service offering include various cloud software applications, including Oracle Fusion cloud enterprise resource planning ERP, Oracle Fusion cloud enterprise performance management EPM, Oracle Fusion cloud supply chain and manufacturing management SCM, Oracle Fusion cloud human capital management HCM, and NetSuite applications suite, Oracle Health applications, as well as Oracle Fusion Sales, Servi...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2026, Oracle's revenue was $67.36 billion, an increase of 17.35% compared to the previous year's $57.40 billion. Earnings were $16.98 billion, an increase of 36.49%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 43 analysts, the average rating for ORCL stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $252.64, which is an increase of 65.71% from the latest price.
